request: Review the client update email before it goes out.

evidence.statement: Read the full draft this session; captured the subject and body.
Two links referenced in the body are not attached or hyperlinked.
Did not verify the recipient's access to the linked dashboard.

pathToShip.item: Add the two missing links and a one-line summary of what changed
Confirm the recipient can open the dashboard link

verdict.reason: Clear and on-message, but two referenced links are missing.
verdict.nextAction: Add the links, confirm access, then send.
